title: Senior Frontend Developer at Apollo Telehealth

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Apollo Telehealth
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Apollo Telehealth! We are hiring a Frontend Developer for our Jabalpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Apollo Telehealth:
Apollo Telehealth is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Telehealth!
